steps.title: Substitute x = 2
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=7x^3+6$. To find $f(2)$, replace every $x$ with $2$: $$f(2)=7(2)^3+6.$$

steps.title: Confirm the function value
steps.content: The question asks for the output $f(2)$, not for a value of $x$. Substituting $2$ into the original function gives the output $62$, so the value of $f(2)$ is 62.
